Title: Army of the Dead
Writer: Zack Snyder, Shay Hatten, Joby Harold
Actors: Dave Bautista, Ella Purnell, Ana de la Reguera
Plot: With the abandoned, walled city of Las Vegas overrun with zombies, after a disastrous government fault, billionaire casino magnate Bly Tanaka realises he has left something behind in Sin City: $200 million to be more precise. But for the time being, his mountains of cash are safe behind an impenetrable casino vault. Now, Tanaka is willing to pay $50 million to decorated former mercenary Scott Ward and his hand-picked team to retrieve the money before the US President nukes the entire city. Indeed, this is a life-changing offer Scott cannot refuse; nevertheless, the rules have changed, and this time, the horde of the walking undead seems to be more organised than they might have expected. And, above all, time is running out. Will Ward's crew return from Vegas in one piece and rich?
Language: English, Spanish, German, French, Bable, Polish
